insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new extensions should not use this API.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and the block_progress capability in new checkout UI extensions. For existing extensions, no immediate action is required, but it's recommended to plan for migration to alternative APIs. The deprecation may affect the functionality of extensions that rely on this API.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience changes in the behavior of checkout UI extensions that use the deprecated API. However, existing extensions will continue to work until they are updated or replaced.
insight.why_it_matters: The deprecation of the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API is important because it may affect the functionality of checkout UI extensions, and developers need to plan for migration to alternative APIs to ensure compatibility with future versions of the Shopify platform.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components

updates.title: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components
updates.summary: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components, allowing apps to access component-level discount allocations.
CLI version 4.5.1 is released with updates to cli-hydrogen.
CLI version 4.5.0 introduces new store commands, including listing and store creation.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1 patch changes include reading disabled command metadata and preserving actionable build errors.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38 patch changes include adding an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: skeleton@2026.4.5 patch changes include adding an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners is now available, providing an additional layer of trust and security.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing updates include increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, requiring updates to existing code.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow updates include changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes and more control over field mismatches.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now resolves an action’s runtime_url on every execution, ensuring the latest URL is used.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS UI extensions, Hydrogen, and App Pricing

themes.title: POS UI Extensions Updates
themes.detail: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components and uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. Additionally, POS Extensions now supports a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

themes.title: Hydrogen and CLI Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen and CLI have received updates, including @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1, @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38, and CLI 4.5.1, which introduce new store commands, preserve actionable build errors, and add an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

themes.title: App Pricing and Security Updates
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated to allow for more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use discount allocations and per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Verify identity as a Shopify Partner
